cards.back: Small units of the input source code, such as keywords, identifiers, and symbols

cards.front: What is the role of the lexical analyzer?
cards.back: To break the source code into tokens and pass them to the parser
The process of analyzing the tokens produced by the lexical analyzer and checking their validity
A grammar that specifies the rules for generating strings of tokens without any explicit order of production

cards.front: What is the purpose of writing a grammar?
cards.back: To define the rules that the lexical analyzer generator should follow to produce valid tokens
